title: Aspen Yellow Birch Tree Leaves
description: A simple resource pack that alters birch leaves to be yellow/golden, like fall-turned aspen trees.
body:
![in-game screenshot of the yellow aspen trees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d288cdc050cb3f0dbd2d839386552094bb88895d.jpeg)
Bring the stunning beauty of golden-yellow aspen trees to your Minecraft world with this vibrant resource pack! Perfect for players seeking to enhance their landscapes with realistic autumn foliage and a serene natural aesthetic.
